_comment: Hand-authored per-weekend notes for the 2026 season draw export. Keyed by ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Each date maps to a list of note objects with 'category' (Field|Request|Preferred|Blocked|Forced, default 'Note') and 'text' (required). Bare strings also accepted: ['plain note'] -> category 'Note'. This file is presentation-only — it does not affect the solver. See spec-028 for schema details.

2026-05-15.text: Masters SC at Broadmeadow — no games before 1:00 pm; PHL Friday night at Gosford instead

2026-08-16.text: State Masters at NIHC — morning timeslots unavailable; games from 12:30 pm onwards
Maitland requested lighter load this weekend (NRL Knights vs Titans clash)

2026-06-12.text: Gosford unavailable entire weekend — all Gosford home games rescheduled; Norths vs Wests 80th Anniversary Friday at NIHC
